content:
It's okay to be
a little jelly

Jelly UI is a dependency-free Web Components library for soft, tactile product
interfaces. Real form controls meet soft-body physics, with dark mode,
right-to-left support and WCAG AA color tokens built in.

0 dependencies
40 custom elements
1 script tag
WCAG AA
Dark mode
RTL

Scroll the showcase ↓
Read the API reference →

<script type="module" src="https://jelly-ui.com/package.js"></script>
<jelly-theme mode="auto">
<jelly-button variant="mint">Publish</jelly-button>
</jelly-theme>
